ul.li: QUERY: List DLQ contents with pagination.
AUDIT: Review failure reasons and retry counts.
SELECT: Pick specific indices for recovery.
EXECUTE: Trigger replay for selected batch.
Parse: Handle Base64 encoded byte arrays.
Atomic: Publish to target topic via SNS.

div.p: Replayed messages are treated as NEW events by the message broker.
Log files are structured as append-only immutable files. Entries contain:
